overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a tribal settlement built around vibrant geothermal hot springs in a snowy mountainous region. The character walks through wooden walkways, observes the colorful pools, and approaches an NPC for interaction.

events.description: Aloy turns away from the shaman and begins walking away from the ritual arch
steps off the wooden platform onto the cracked geothermal crust terrain

agents.ego_description: walking away from the ritual site across the gray geothermal flats toward the settlement

notable_agents.action: shaman in blue robes standing still at the ritual arch with arms raised

entered.detail: wooden arch structure adorned with hanging blue fabrics and a glowing cyan flame
rocky cliff face with patches of snow and sparse vegetation
gray cracked earth surface with steam rising from geothermal activity
snow-dusted evergreen trees on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a tribal ritual site where Aloy stands near a shaman by a glowing blue flame. She turns and walks away across the cracked geothermal crust, leaving the wooden arch structure behind as she heads toward the settlement in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal settlement with wooden walkways and textile drying racks

events.description: enters the main settlement area with colorful textiles and wooden structures becoming visible
turns right onto an elevated wooden walkway passing by working villagers

agents.ego_description: walking through the settlement observing the colorful textiles and geothermal features

notable_agents.action: villager in yellow clothing standing near textile racks

entered.detail: vibrant geothermal pool with rainbow colors including yellow, green, blue, and red sections
elevated paths constructed from logs and branches crossing the geothermal areas
wooden structures with colorful blue and yellow fabrics hanging to dry
large woven baskets and wooden barrels near tent structures

segments.scene_description: Aloy enters the main settlement area, walking on elevated wooden walkways past drying textiles and wooden barrels. The vibrant colorful hot spring pools become visible to the right as she navigates through the tribal village with snow-capped cliffs now visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal pool overlook with mountain views

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the sky, clouds, and a large dead tree while Aloy stands still
approaches the villager and an interaction prompt appears for dialogue

agents.ego_description: standing by the colorful pool looking up at the sky and trees, then walking toward a villager

notable_agents.action: villager in green and yellow robes standing near the pool edge facing away

entered.detail: leafless tree with twisted bare branches silhouetted against the sky
snow-capped mountain peak visible through the hazy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: Aloy reaches the edge of the vibrant hot spring pool where the camera pans upward to show a dramatic view of the sky, a large dead tree, and distant mountains. She then turns and approaches a villager standing near the pool, with an interaction prompt appearing as she gets close.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded ritual site into the heart of a vibrant tribal settlement nestled among snowy peaks. It begins with Aloy standing beside a shaman by a glowing blue flame, moving away from a wooden arch across the cracked geothermal crust. As she advances, the terrain shifts into the main village, where the camera follows her along elevated wooden walkways past drying textiles and barrels while colorful hot spring pools emerge to the right and snow-capped cliffs rise to the left. The scene then opens up at the edge of a vibrant pool, with the camera panning upward to reveal a dramatic vista of a large dead tree and distant mountains against the sky. Finally, the view descends as Aloy turns toward a nearby villager, approaching them until an interaction prompt appears.
